2605.23454.title: ARES: Automated Rubric Synthesis for Scalable LLM Reinforcement Learning
2605.23454.paper_summary: Rubric-based rewards offer a promising way to extend reinforcement learning (RL) for large language models beyond tasks with automatically verifiable answers. However, scaling rubric-based RL remains challenging: existing approaches often rely on expert-written rubrics and manually constructed question sets, while fixed task-level rubrics may fail to capture the evaluation requirements of individual questions. We propose ARES (Automated Rubric synthEsis for Scalable RL), a framework for automatically constructing rubric-based RL data at scale. Starting from raw pretraining documents, ARES converts source knowledge into self-contained question-answer pairs and co-generates question-specific weighted rubrics, enabling instance-level reward supervision for open-ended responses. To improve diversity and quality, ARES conditions generation on domain labels and persona information, and applies validation filters for question self-containment, answer faithfulness, and rubric validity. Using ARES, we construct 100K rubric-annotated instances across ten domains. Experiments on seven benchmarks show that rubric-based RL trained with ARES, outperforms continual pretraining, supervised fine-tuning, and binary-reward RL, with the largest gains on multi-dimensional open-ended tasks such as healthcare and instruction following.
2605.23454.paper_summary_zh: 基於評分標準的獎勵提供了一種有前景的方法，可以將強化學習（RL）擴展到大型語言模型，超越具有自動可驗證答案的任務。<lb/>然而，擴展基於評分標準的強化學習仍然具有挑戰性：現有的方法通常依賴專家撰寫的評分標準和手動構建的問題集，而固定的任務級別評分標準可能無法捕捉到單個問題的評估需求。<lb/>我們提出了ARES（自動化評分標準合成以擴展RL），這是一個自動構建基於評分標準的強化學習數據的框架。<lb/>從原始的預訓練文檔開始，ARES將源知識轉換為自包含的問題-答案對，並共同生成問題特定的加權評分標準，使開放式回答能夠進行實例級獎勵監督。<lb/>為了提高多樣性和質量，ARES在生成過程中考慮了領域標籤和角色信息，並應用了驗證過濾器，以確保問題的自包含性、答案的真實性和評分標準的有效性。<lb/>使用ARES，我們在十個領域構建了10萬個帶有評分標準的實例。<lb/>在七個基準上的實驗顯示，使用ARES訓練的基於評分標準的強化學習超越了持續預訓練、監督微調和二元獎勵強化學習，並在多維開放式任務（如醫療保健和指令跟隨）上獲得了最大的增益。
2605.23454.author: Xiaoyuan Li et.al.
2605.23454.authors: Xiaoyuan Li, Keqin Bao, Moxin Li, Yubo Ma, Yichang Zhang, Wenjie Wang, Fuli Feng, Dayiheng Liu
